entry.value:
{"_fallback":{"_fallback":null,"currentConversationId":"__NEW_AGENT__","pins":{},"agentExecutionMode":"manual","isPanelCollapsed":false,"displayedAnnouncements":[],"conversations":{"__NEW_AGENT__":{"id":"__NEW_AGENT__","createdAtIso":"2026-01-25T10:32:38.254Z","lastInteractedAtIso":"2026-01-25T10:32:38.254Z","selectedModelId":"claude-opus-4-5","requestIds":[],"isPinned":false,"isShareable":false,"extraData":{"isAgentConversation":true},"personaType":0,"rootTaskUuid":"8cdce0a8-236e-4936-aa0f-a1384571e101","toolUseStates":{},"chatHistory":[{"request_id":"93c8424a-c99a-45fb-8b0e-fe8d533238c3","uuid":"219617ad-7d3c-441d-bdcb-c03bf0ce6af0","chatItemType":"agentic-checkpoint-delimiter","status":"success","fromTimestamp":0,"toTimestamp":1769337158256}],"feedbackStates":{},"draftExchange":{"request_message":"this is going to be a static github page. please add required files with some test content for now. later it will be landing page","rich_text_json_repr":{"type":"doc","content":[{"type":"paragraph","content":[{"type":"text","text":"this is going to be a static github page. please add required files with some test content for now. later it will be landing page"}]}]},"status":"draft"}}}},"currentConversationId":"ee4bbf2d-42ab-465f-90c5-eb04b1776622","pins":{},"agentExecutionMode":"manual","isPanelCollapsed":false,"displayedAnnouncements":[],"conversations":{"7a1fc9ab-324e-4045-b34c-25133dd1c573":{"id":"7a1fc9ab-324e-4045-b34c-25133dd1c573","name":"
GitHub Pages Static Site Setup
","createdAtIso":"2026-01-25T10:32:38.254Z","lastInteractedAtIso":"2026-01-25T10:32:38.254Z","selectedModelId":"claude-opus-4-5","requestIds":[],"isPinned":false,"isShareable":false,"extraData":{"isAgentConversation":true},"personaType":0,"rootTaskUuid":"8cdce0a8-236e-4936-aa0f-a1384571e101","toolUseStates":{},"chatHistory":[{"request_id":"93c8424a-c99a-45fb-8b0e-fe8d533238c3","uuid":"219617ad-7d3c-441d-bdcb-c03bf0ce6af0","chatItemType":"agentic-checkpoint-delimiter","status":"success","fromTimestamp":0,"toTimestamp":1769337158256,"seen_state":"seen"},{"chatItemType":"exchange-pointer","exchangeUuid":"2e0acce6-67c1-472f-9ba8-ce02337c9e59","timestamp":"2026-01-25T10:33:39.560Z","request_message":"this is going to be a static github page. please add required files with some test content for now. later it will be landing page","status":"success","seen_state":"seen"},{"chatItemType":"exchange-pointer","exchangeUuid":"1e1b2277-52e2-4d52-9dcc-4db77504c7eb","timestamp":"2026-01-25T10:33:44.885Z","request_message":"","status":"success","seen_state":"seen"},{"chatItemType":"exchange-pointer","exchangeUuid":"eb9fc600-f648-4ea8-8f25-054e904775a7","timestamp":"2026-01-25T10:34:05.315Z","request_message":"","status":"success","seen_state":"seen"}],"feedbackStates":{},"draftExchange":{"request_message":"remove the index","rich_text_json_repr":{"type":"doc","content":[{"type":"paragraph","content":[{"type":"text","text":"remove the index"}]}]},"status":"draft"}},"ee4bbf2d-42ab-465f-90c5-eb04b1776622":{"id":"ee4bbf2d-42ab-465f-90c5-eb04b1776622","createdAtIso":"2026-01-25T11:29:14.734Z","lastInteractedAtIso":"2026-01-25T12:05:42.111Z","selectedModelId":"claude-opus-4-5","requestIds":[],"isPinned":false,"isShareable":false,"extraData":{"isAgentConversation":true,"baselineTimestamp":0},"personaType":0,"rootTaskUuid":"9c088b84-f2f0-41c4-99b2-1dfadee3f42b","toolUseStates":{},"chatHistory":[{"request_id":"f1801d58-50aa-490b-b232-7a498195f7da","uuid":"a780a28a-4bc5-4eb2-b4d0-cc605fac1690","chatItemType":"agentic-checkpoint-delimiter","status":"success","fromTimestamp":0,"toTimestamp":1769340554737},{"chatItemType":"exchange-pointer","exchangeUuid":"89aa1f54-cb5c-41ad-8a50-b03d6f8d86fa","timestamp":"2026-01-25T11:33:52.809Z","request_message":"I'm going to organize english lessons for beginners in vrchat. you need to create a lending page. this should be a static page. make it mobile first.
The page should be in russian language.
The page should have share buttons for telegram, vk, discord.

this is the info:
Где проходят уроки?
В vrchat мире English Hub

Когда?
Каждое воскресение в 20:00 по москве. Начинаем 8 февраля

Это бесплатно?
Да. Лучшей поддержкой для будет, если вы пригласите друзей, которые заинтересованны в изучении английского.

Кто учитель?
Частный преподаватель английского языка - Boogie_Green (https://vrchat.com/home/user/usr_c5f1e083-7058-4116-b65f-422e62a4149f)

Как попасть на урок?
Чтоб присоединиться вам необходимо быть участником группы English-Russian Club (https://vrchat.com/home/group/grp_f0431999-599e-47a9-af45-f894a14efa13)
За 15 минут до начала, мы создадим групповой инстанс и отправим ссылку-приглашение в Discord (https://discord.gg/4fW5d5dUKa)

Хотите записаться на индивидуальный урок Boogie_Green?
Напишите ему в телеграм @boogie_green
Также у него есть канал посвященный английскому t.me/bolat_english

---

you can format and rearrange it. but keep the meaning.","status":"success","seen_state":"unseen"},{"chatItemType":"exchange-pointer","exchangeUuid":"fb628230-1bdd-4803-87f6-38c6f2698687","timestamp":"2026-01-25T11:33:58.617Z","request_message":"","status":"success","seen_state":"unseen"},{"chatItemType":"exchange-pointer","exchangeUuid":"883f4433-c055-46c0-878f-fdc0c95bd1dc","timestamp":"2026-01-25T11:34:25.860Z","request_message":"","status":"success","seen_state":"unseen"},{"chatItemType":"exchange-pointer","exchangeUuid":"4dbc44f7-0c91-4e8e-b4b8-36705454eb6e","timestamp":"2026-01-25T11:35:16.129Z","request_message":"","status":"success","seen_state":"unseen"},{"chatItemType":"exchange-pointer","exchangeUuid":"efcdb8fd-6099-4631-8612-e6e4fcebcbbd","timestamp":"2026-01-25T11:35:20.106Z","request_message":"","status":"success","seen_state":"unseen"},{"chatItemType":"exchange-pointer","exchangeUuid":"05d17e51-91ba-4198-97ca-50c32cdd4208","timestamp":"2026-01-25T11:37:54.906Z","request_message":"please fallow this stile
